title: S + V + in order to / so as to + V

formulas.formula: S + V + in order to / so as to + V
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + 為了...目的 + 不定詞動詞

formulas.formula: In order to / So as to + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 為了...目的 + 不定詞動詞，主詞 + 動詞（目的句置句首）

explanation: 不定詞用以表示行動目的，in order to 和 so as to 為正式用法，皆可置句首或句中。in order to 較常用，so as to 多見書面語。否定形式為 in order not to / so as not to。口語環境直接用 to 更簡潔。此句型強調主要動作實現的明確目標，常用於說明計畫、方法或原因。

examples.eng: She studies hard in order to pass the exam.
examples.chi: 她努力讀書是為了通過考試。

examples.eng: To save time, we decided to take the express train.
examples.chi: 為了節省時間，我們決定搭乘快速列車。

examples.eng: He locked the door so as not to be disturbed while working.
examples.chi: 他鎖上門是為了工作時不被打擾。

examples.eng: In order to improve her English, Mary watches English movies every day.
examples.chi: 為了改進英文，瑪麗每天看英文電影。

extension.tip: in order to 和 to 意思相同，但 in order to 更強調明確目的，適用正式場合。so as to 最正式但較少見。in order not to 是否定目的的正式表達；口語直接用 not to。注意：不定詞主詞必須與主句主詞相同。

examples.test: He went to the library to study. / He went to the library in order to study.
examples.result: → 兩句意思相同，to 更口語，in order to 更正式

examples.test: 錯：He went there so as to meeting his friend. / 正：He went there so as to meet his friend.
examples.result: → in order to / so as to 後必用原形不定詞，不可加 -ing

examples.test: She stayed quiet in order not to disturb the others.
examples.result: → 否定目的用 in order not to / so as not to，語意清晰

extension.note: in order to = so as to = to（意思相同，正式度遞減），否定加 not to，記住：目的不定詞的主詞同主句主詞。

blanks: in order to / so as to / to
exercises.sentence: The athlete trained every day in order to win the championship.
exercises.translation: 這位運動員每天訓練是為了贏得冠軍。

parts: avoid traffic, we left early in the morning.
blanks: In order to / So as to / To
exercises.sentence: In order to avoid traffic, we left early in the morning.
exercises.translation: 為了避開交通堵塞，我們一大早就出發了。

parts: not be recognized by the paparazzi.
blanks: in order to / so as to
exercises.sentence: She wore a mask in order not to be recognized by the paparazzi.
exercises.translation: 她戴上面具是為了不被狗仔隊認出來。

parts: buy a house in the city.
blanks: in order to / so as to / to
exercises.sentence: We saved money for years in order to buy a house in the city.
exercises.translation: 我們存了多年的錢是為了在城市裡買房子。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的片語完成句子，表示目的
mc_exercises.question_eng: He wakes up early every morning _______ to catch the first bus to work.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 A。『in order to』是表示目的的標準片語，後接動詞原形。B 項『so as』後必須接『to』才能成立（so as to）。C、D 選項雖表目的但需要不同的文法結構，不符合此句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的否定形式完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: She turned off her phone _______ be disturbed during the meeting.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 C。『in order not to』是表示否定目的的正確形式，否定詞 not 置於 to 之前。A 項文法錯誤；B 項應為『so as not to』；D 項『so not to』不是正確的英文表達。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別句首置放時的正確形式及主詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ improve their English skills, many students attend conversation clubs after school.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 B。『In order to』置於句首後須接原形動詞，再加主詞及主要動詞。A 項『So as to』雖然文法可接受，但『in order to』更常用於此位置。C 項『So as』缺少『to』。D 項為非標準用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合題：判斷正確形式、位置及上下文邏輯
mc_exercises.question_eng: The government has implemented stricter environmental policies _______ reduce carbon emissions and _______ environmental degradation for future generations.

options.text: so as to; in order not to prevent
in order to; so as not to allow
so as to; so as to prevent

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 B。第一空需『in order to reduce』表達正面目的；第二空需『so as not to allow』表達否定目的。A 項『prevent』與『not to』語義重複；C 項第二部分邏輯錯誤（應為『not to』而非『to prevent』）；D 項『for preventing』不符合不定詞目的用法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我每天早起是為了趕上公車。
translation_exercises.answer: I get up early every day in order to catch the bus.
key_points: in order to + V 表示目的
hints: 句型：S + V + in order to + V，in order to 後接原形動詞
注意：不能寫成 'in order to catching' 或 'for catching'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 為了節省時間，她邊走路邊吃早餐。
translation_exercises.answer: In order to save time, she eats breakfast while walking.
key_points: In order to + V 置句首
while walking 表示同時進行
hints: 句型：In order to + V, S + V，句首需用逗號分隔
注意：so as to 也可使用，但 in order to 更常用於正式英文

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生們努力讀書，以便不讓父母失望。
translation_exercises.answer: Students study hard in order not to disappoint their parents.
key_points: in order not to + V 表示否定目的
hints: 句型：S + V + in order not to + V，否定形式在 to 後加 not
注意：so as not to 也正確，但避免混用 'in order to not' 或 'in not to'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 為了了解不同的文化，許多年輕人選擇出國旅遊而不是待在家裡。
translation_exercises.answer: In order to understand different cultures, many young people choose to travel abroad so as not to stay at home.
key_points: In order to + V 置句首表明核心目的
so as not to 表示否定目的
hints: 句型：In order to + V, S + V，後句可再用 so as not to 強調避免的反面結果
注意：in order to 和 so as not to 可混用，但需注意邏輯關係清晰，避免目的層級混亂
